memory.summary: I just saw the quiz is due tomorrow at 09:00 and our 19:00 meeting stays on today, while Assignment A is still only halfway done. With my sleep debt and stress, this feels like I’m compressing too much into one day.

goals.description: Finish Individual assignment A (complete remaining 50%: finalize solution + edit for correctness).
goals.rationale: Wed 23:59 hard deadline; 50% progress means this is the biggest time-critical irreversible task.

goals.description: Prep for Thursday 9AM quiz (start from scratch: complete first full pass of key problems/concepts).
goals.rationale: Thu 09:00 hard deadline; needs early momentum since progress is 0%.

goals.description: Team project meeting prep (quick agenda + confirm next deliverables/questions to bring).
goals.rationale: Wed 19:00 soft deadline; do the minimum prep so meeting doesn’t waste time.
